description: Recto: Calligraphic copy of Joshua with annotations. Verso: A fragment of a colophon or note, repeated twice, "This is the book, the four first books, what our teacher and rabbi and good elder Yosef b. Shelomo dedicated in the great synagogue in the city of [...]."
description_he: טקסט ספרותי בעברית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
